army_customisation.intro:
Army Customisation allows you to further individualise your force. Archetypes change how you build your army by moving around units in the Army Organisation Plan (AOP) or letting you take more of a unit than you would normally be allowed to. Legacies give access to armories and disciplines of legendary factions. Traits enhance your units with special abilities that they normally would not be able to have.

You may select up to the following:
0-1 Archetype, 0-1 Legacy, 0-2 Traits

If a Trait is taken, all models / units in the army must be upgraded with it, unless stated otherwise.

archetypes.name: Canoptek Court
archetypes.description:
- Can only select Crypteks as HQ units.
- Up to two Crypteks may be taken for every HQ slot.
- <Canoptek> units gain the "Objective secured!" ability.

archetypes.name: Destroyer Cult
archetypes.description:
- The army has access to the following units only, regardless of other traits:
- Crypteks with Skorpekh body, Lords with Destroyer bodies, Skorpekh Lords
- Flayed Ones
- Canoptek Reanimators, Canoptek Spyders, C'tan Shards (any), Plasmacytes, Skorpekh Destroyers
- Canoptek Scarabs, Canoptek Wraiths, Ophydian Destroyers
- Canoptek Doomstalkers, Lokhust Destroyers
- Skorpekh Destroyers can be taken as Troops.

archetypes.name: Obeisance Phalanx
archetypes.description:
- A Lord or Overlord must be taken as an HQ selection.
- Lychguard and Triarch Praetorians can be taken as Troops.
- No other Troop units may be selected.

archetypes.name: Yngir
archetypes.description:
- One C'tan shard (any kind) counts as an HQ selection.
- The model gains +1 Strength, +1 Toughness, +1 Initiative, +1 Attacks and a 2+ armor save.
- The range for each C'tan power is increased by 6" and it knows the "Time's Arrow" power. 
- It costs an additional +85 points.
- Pariahs can be taken as Troops.

legacies.name: Channeling Solar Energies
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Nephrekh dynasty in the Dynasty Armory.

legacies.name: Extermination of all Life
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Szarekhan dynasty in the Dynasty Armory.

legacies.name: Industrial Slaughter
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Novokh dynasty in the Dynasty Armory.

legacies.name: Secure Borders
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Nihilakh dynasty in the Dynasty Armory.

legacies.name: Starkillers
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Mephrit dynasty in the Dynasty Armory.

legacies.name: The Lord of the Storm
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Sautekh dynasty in the Dynasty Armory.

traits.name: Arise against Interlopers
traits.description: If the unit uses a Charge order or gets charged by an enemy unit, it gains +1 to melee hit rolls until the end of the current battle round.

traits.name: Eternal Conquerors
traits.description: The unit prevents 1 RPoint from being lost for itself and gains 1 temporary RPoint each Reinforcement phase, if it is within 6" of an objective marker. Only for <Necron> units.

traits.name: Immovable Phalanx
traits.description: If the unit uses Stand & Shoot, it gains a +1 bonus to armor saves until its next activation. Can't be combined with "Merciless hunters".

traits.name: Interplanetary Invasors
traits.description: Vehicle units can fire all weapons, if they move up to 12". Only for vehicles.

traits.name: Isolationists
traits.description: The unit's "Rapid Fire" weapons gain +1 Strength when being resolved against targets that are within half weapon range.

traits.name: Masters of the Martial
traits.description: The unit can re-roll one hit roll per activation.

traits.name: Merciless Hunters
traits.description: The unit can fire "Rapid Fire" weapons twice at full range with a "Stand & Shoot" order. Can't be combined with "Immovable phalanx".

traits.name: RAD-wreathed
traits.description: Enemy units within 3" of the unit suffer a -1 penalty to their Toughness.

traits.name: Relentless Expansionism
traits.description: The unit gains the "Vanguard" ability . Can't be combined with "Translocation beams".

traits.name: Solar Fury
traits.description: The unit's weapons increase their range by 3".

traits.name: Superior Artisans
traits.description: The unit can re-roll one armor penetration or wound roll per activation.

traits.name: The unmerciful Horde
traits.description: The unit can re-roll failed Leadership tests.

traits.name: Translocation Beams
traits.description: The unit automatically advances 6" instead of rolling for it, ignoring terrain. Can't be combined with "Relentless expansionism".

traits.name: Vassal Dynasty
traits.description: The army must select a second Legacy. Each model may only select items from one Legacy armory.

traits.name: Vengeful Stars
traits.description: The unit's ranged attacks gain a -1 AP bonus when being resolved against targets that are within half weapon range.

traits.name: Warrior Nobles
traits.description: The unit can re-roll one (additional) hit and one (additional) wound roll per activation. Only for HQ units.
